candidate_blockers.detail: Symmetric pressure-pair sampling is diagnostic evidence only.
Per-face one-sided pressure support is not implemented yet.
Rows reuse one flow snapshot and do not advance coupled FSI.
No coupled or Fluent comparison run is part of this artifact.

rows.scope_limit: shared snapshot sampling-only symmetric pressure cell-pair diagnostic on archived shared preflow velocity/pressure/obstacle fields; does not advance coupled FSI and does not claim Fluent parity.
